title: Feeds Update
content:
Dear Feeds Readers,

After running offline experiment with "FeedBurner":http://www.feedburner.com for a while, I think it's quite safe to point the site's feeds to the new location. So please kindly update macSF.net's feeds to the following links:

tbox: http://feeds.feedburner.com/macsf/tbox
tbox comments:  http://feeds.feedburner.com/macsf/tbox_comments
tbox sidethoughts:  http://feeds.feedburner.com/macsf/sidethoughts

Please drop a line if you have any problem with the new locations.

Thanks and Have a good day.

P.S. Regular readers, you don't need to make any changes to your bookmarks. Everything is still the same.

%(me)link ข้างต้นใช้กับโปรแกรมประเภท feed aggregators หรือ "Bloglines":http://www.bloglines.com หนะครับ ส่วน link ของ website ยังเหมือนเดิมอ่านิ%
